---
title: "data exploration"
format: pdf
---

# Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

library(tidyverse)

library(here)

library(scales)

library(snakecase)
```

# Data

```{r}
#| label: data

birds <- read.csv(here("data", "birds.csv"))

weather <- read.csv(here("data", "NOAA_daily_summaries.csv"))
```

# Cleaning Data

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-birds

birds_clean <- birds |> 
  filter(e_bird_group == "Waterfowl",
         repeat_observation == "No",
         observation_date > "2019-09-30" & observation_date < "2025-10-01")

```

```{r}
#| label: cleaning-weather

weather_clean <- weather |> 
  filter(DATE > "2019-09-30" & DATE < "2025-10-01")

```

```{r}
#| label: joining-data-frames

bird_weather <- full_join(
  x = birds_clean,
  y = weather_clean,
  by = c("observation_date" = "DATE")) |> 
  select(c(observation_date, season, species, count, PRCP))
```


# trying visualizations

```{r}
#| label: trying-visualization

ggplot(data = bird_weather,
       mapping = aes(x = PRCP,
                     y = count,
                     color = species)) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~season, scales = "free")
  
```
